name: Twin Natural Wood Bed - Pillowfort™
description: Accentuate the look of your kid's bedroom with this Twin Natural Wood Bed from Pillowfort™. Built on a wooden frame in a stained finish, this twin bed features a comfortable low profile and raised headboard with thin rods to offer comfort as they lean or recline back to read or relax in bed. The solid-color bed easily integrates into any decor style or color scheme — just add a mattress to complete the look.
